days.text: Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Showers, heavy at times. A few thunderstorms. Force 4 to 5 south to southeasterly winds, occasionally force 6 with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional Thundery showers. Force 4 to 5 southerly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 4 to 5 southerly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 5 southerly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. Showers will ease off later. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds with gusts.
